title: Australia Temporarily Blocks Iranians With Visitor Visas From Entry
summary_full: Iranian tourists with visas will be barred for six months in case they are ‘unable or unlikely’ to go back because of the war, Australian officials said.
summary_public: Iranian tourists with visas will be barred for six months in case they are ‘unable or unlikely’ to go back because of the war, Australian officials said.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Australia Temporarily Blocks Iranians With Visitor Visas From Entry
